objective: Extend the existing governance bootstrap for Seek and Ponder so post-deploy staged core smoke can receive seeded-login credential names through approved generated-env surfaces.
scope_boundary: Modify the existing scripts/bootstrap-repo-env.sh Seek targets only.
Document the new Seek staged smoke env-name mapping in existing registry/progress surfaces.
Do not create a second credential loader, copy secret values, or deploy Cloudflare Pages from this governance lane.
out_of_scope: Committing .env.shared, generated .env files, token values, Authorization headers, signed URLs, or screenshots.
Changing the reusable Pages deploy gate or verifier implementation.
Mutating downstream seek-and-ponder files from this governance lane.
research_summary: Seek post-deploy staged core smoke requires SEEK_STAGING_PRO_EMAIL, SEEK_STAGING_PRO_PASSWORD, SEEK_STAGING_SCHOLAR_EMAIL, and SEEK_STAGING_SCHOLAR_PASSWORD. These names exist in governance .env.shared but were not emitted by Seek bootstrap targets.

sprints.name: Seek staged core smoke env propagation
sprints.goal: Make the existing Seek bootstrap targets emit the seeded-login variable names needed by downstream staged core smoke.
tasks: Add SEEK_STAGING_PRO_EMAIL, SEEK_STAGING_PRO_PASSWORD, SEEK_STAGING_SCHOLAR_EMAIL, and SEEK_STAGING_SCHOLAR_PASSWORD to the seek, seek-local, and seek-worktree generated env templates.
Use empty defaults so synthetic bootstrap contract tests do not fail under set -u.
Update feature/progress mirrors and preserve no-secret validation evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run bootstrap output for seek, seek-local, and seek-worktree includes staged smoke seeded-login names with redacted or empty values only.
Provisioning evidence validator passes for all changed files.
Execution scope and Local CI Gate pass before merge.

specialist_reviews.focus: Avoid adding another secret provisioning mechanism.
specialist_reviews.summary: The existing bootstrap tool is the right surface; extend it for the missing Seek staged smoke names.

alternate_model_review.reviewer: not required for scoped bootstrap env-name propagation
alternate_model_review.summary: This is a bounded extension of an existing bootstrap target under the approved #467/#471 Pages deploy adoption plan.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #471 may update bootstrap/env registry/progress evidence needed for the Seek governed Pages deploy post-deploy smoke.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Validate, merge, then use the updated bootstrap to reprovision the temporary Seek deploy worktree for smoke proof.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: No generated env files or secret values are committed.

material_deviation_rules: If staged smoke still lacks required names after bootstrap, stop and record the missing approved provisioning surface instead of using inline secret exports.
If downstream Seek code needs further edits, use seek-and-ponder#163, not this governance lane.
